title: Hells Paradise
description: A mod that adds reaper/grim reaper armor and ingot to Minecraft which has OP abilities!
body:
Add reaper armor and ingot to Minecraft which have OP abilities!

WARNING! THIS MOD IS A WORK IN PROGRESS EXPECT DRAGONS!



This mod adds grim reaper armor which has OP abilities like: 

Screen Saver - saves the player's inventory just like keepInventory.

Teleport Steal - teleports the player to a saved location, save your location with keybind "I", and teleport to the location with "O". When teleporting you will take 8 damage (4 hearts). 

Air Tight - disables the player from taking fall damage.

Lava Walkers - replaces lava beneath the player with basalt just like the Frost Walker enchant.



Future updates will add:

speed and jump height increase when wearing reaperite armor,

grim reaper's scythe and tools,

harder crafting recipe for reaperite making you required to complete missions,

angel armor and tools,

and some buffs to the reaperite armor.
